analysis.summary: The technician is performing a configuration task within the Cisco UCS Manager web interface. They navigated to Fabric Interconnect B's Ethernet ports and initiated the process to configure Port 31 as an FCoE Storage Port by right-clicking and selecting the appropriate option.
actions_taken: Navigated to Fabric Interconnect B (primary) under Fabric Interconnects in Cisco UCS Manager
Selected the Ethernet Ports tab to view port details
Right-clicked on Port 31 to open the context menu
Prepared to select 'Configure as FCoE Storage Port' from the context menu
